'''Garlostar''' was a manufacturing company. They produced [[heat-absorbing tent]]s that were used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtrooper]] [[Legion/Legends|legions]].<ref name="SWS" />
